topic.title: Uber | SDE2 SF Phone interview |  Scheduler

post.content: 1. Group Anagrams : https://leetcode.com/problems/group-anagrams/description/\n2. Build a reservation system for a predefined set of conference rooms given as a list of room Ids [\u2018roomA\u2019, roomB\u2019...]. It should have a method like scheduleMeeting(startTime, endTime), which should return a reservation identifier (including roomId) and reserve the room or an error if no rooms are available.
Hi Anon, can you please share which role is this for and location?
